name: R5RatioRangeElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 RatioRange to FHIR R4 no direct target type
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 RatioRange to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `RatioRange.lowNumerator` is part of an existing definition because parent element `RatioRange` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `RatioRange.lowNumerator` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RatioRange` is not mapped.
Element `RatioRange.lowNumerator` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If the low element is missing, the low boundary is not known.

Element `RatioRange.highNumerator` is part of an existing definition because parent element `RatioRange` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `RatioRange.highNumerator` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RatioRange` is not mapped.
Element `RatioRange.highNumerator` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If the high element is missing, the high boundary is not known.
